name: Deep dive: EInvoiceUpload
description: Conduct a thorough code-level analysis of the EInvoiceUpload repository. Clone the repo, analyse source code, database scripts, configuration, and tests. Produce a structured deep-dive report covering all files requiring changes, new files needed, database impact, test changes, and effort estimates.
acceptance_criteria: Repo cloned to repos/EInvoiceUpload/ on initiative branch
Files requiring changes identified with change types
New files needed listed with proposed paths
steps: Clone repo using repo_clone MCP tool
Read jira-context.md and prior research documents for context
Review API contracts and test coverage
